# Simplify

Iteratively simplify the code in $file without changing its behaviour: each
iteration diverges along three heuristics and selects, and a fresh-context
judge picks the best iteration at the end.

$heuristics = ["make it more direct", "make it more obvious", "make it smaller"]
$code = the contents of $file
$iterations = []

FOR $i IN [1 .. $n]
  $simplified = USE ~/skills/map-reduce
  WITH
    worker: general
    items: $heuristics
    map: Simplify this code, pushing in one direction: {$item}. Preserve the module's behaviour and public interface exactly; its test suite must still pass. Return the complete revised file, nothing else. Code: {$code}
    reduce: Pick the candidate that most improves the code, or merge two if they compose cleanly: simpler, clearer, behaviour unchanged. Return one file.
  Append $simplified to $iterations
  $code = $simplified
END

$winner = SPAWN general
WITH
  instruction: Compare these versions of the same module and return the best one: the simplest version that is still clear, complete, and behaviour-preserving. The winner need not be the last.
  iterations: $iterations

RETURN $winner

```typescript
/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE = "half-up";
const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

const CENTS_PER_UNIT: Record<Currency, number> = {
  GBP: 100,
  EUR: 100,
  USD: 100,
};

function roundForCurrency(value: number, currency: Currency): number {
  const scale = CENTS_PER_UNIT[currency];
  return Math.round(value * scale) / scale;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discount strategies
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Application order matters: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty.

interface DiscountStrategy {
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}

const bulkDiscount: DiscountStrategy = {
  applies: (order) =>
    order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
  apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
};

const multiLineDiscount: DiscountStrategy = {
  applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
  apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
};

const loyaltyDiscount: DiscountStrategy = {
  applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
  apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
};

const DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES: readonly DiscountStrategy[] = [
  bulkDiscount,
  multiLineDiscount,
  loyaltyDiscount,
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

type ResolvedOptions = {
  vatRate: number;
  roundingMode: "half-up";
  locale: string;
  hooks: PricingHooks;
};

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

interface Stage {
  name: string;
  run(total: number, order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number;
}

const STAGES: readonly Stage[] = [
  {
    name: "subtotal",
    run: (_total, order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  },
  {
    name: "discount",
    run: (total, order) =>
      DISCOUNT_STRATEGIES.reduce(
        (running, strategy) =>
          strategy.applies(order) ? strategy.apply(running) : running,
        total,
      ),
  },
  {
    name: "tax",
    run: (total, _order, options) => total * (1 + options.vatRate),
  },
  {
    name: "rounding",
    run: (total, order) => roundForCurrency(total, order.currency),
  },
];

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  let total = 0;
  for (const stage of STAGES) {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
    total = stage.run(total, order, options);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, total);
  }
  return total;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Facade
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

What changed, in one direction (more direct):

- Collapsed `MoneyValue`/`CurrencyConversionTable`/`CurrencyConverter` — conversion was always a no-op (rate always 1), so I dropped the indirection and just carried plain numbers through the pipeline, tagged by `order.currency` only where rounding needs it.
- Collapsed the three near-identical `*RoundingPolicy` classes and their resolver into one `roundForCurrency` function driven by a `Currency -> scale` map (all three were `Math.round(v*100)/100` anyway).
- Replaced the `DiscountStrategy` classes + `DiscountStrategyRegistry` with plain objects and an array — same `applies`/`apply` shape, same registration order (bulk, multi-line, loyalty), no behavior change.
- Replaced manual loops (`totalQuantity`, `distinctLineNames`) with `reduce` and `Set`.
- Replaced the `PipelineStage` classes + `PricingPipeline` + `PricingPipelineFactory` with a `Stage[]` array and a `runPipeline` function — same stage names (`subtotal`, `discount`, `tax`, `rounding`) and same hook-call semantics (`beforeStage`/`afterStage` around each stage, `afterStage` receiving the running total).
- `PricingFacade` and `computePrice` are unchanged in signature and behavior.

I did not run the test suite myself (no test file was provided in this conversation) — worth running `npx tsx --test <path-to-test>.ts` against this before merging.</result>

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS: Required<Omit<PricingOptions, "hooks">> = {
  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up",
  locale: "en-GB",
};

function resolveOptions(
  options?: PricingOptions,
): Required<Omit<PricingOptions, "hooks">> & { hooks: PricingHooks } {
  return {
    ...DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS,
    ...(options ?? {}),
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discount strategies
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty.

interface DiscountStrategy {
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}

const discountStrategies: DiscountStrategy[] = [
  {
    // Bulk: 10% off when total quantity across lines is at least 10.
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    // Multi-line: 2% off when the order has at least 3 distinct item names.
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    // Loyalty: 5% off for loyalty members.
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// All supported currencies round the same way (nearest cent/penny); the
// per-currency lookup exists so a currency needing different rounding can be
// added without touching the pipeline.

const roundingPolicies: Record<Currency, (value: number) => number> = {
  GBP: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  EUR: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  USD: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
};

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

type Stage = (order: Order, total: number, options: PricingOptions) => number;

const stages: [name: string, run: Stage][] = [
  [
    "subtotal",
    (order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  ],
  [
    "discount",
    (order, total) =>
      discountStrategies.reduce(
        (result, strategy) =>
          strategy.applies(order) ? strategy.apply(result) : result,
        total,
      ),
  ],
  [
    "tax",
    (_order, total, options) =>
      total * (1 + (options.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS.vatRate)),
  ],
  ["rounding", (order, total) => roundingPolicies[order.currency](total)],
];

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ReturnType<typeof resolveOptions>;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    for (const [name, run] of stages) {
      this.options.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
      total = run(order, total, this.options);
      this.options.hooks.afterStage?.(name, total);
    }
    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  name: "multi-line",

  apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
};

  name: "loyalty",
  applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
  apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
};

const DISCOUNT_RULES: readonly DiscountRule[] = [
  BULK_DISCOUNT,
  MULTI_LINE_DISCOUNT,
  LOYALTY_DISCOUNT,
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
//
// Currency conversion is a no-op today: orders are priced in their own
// currency, and every conversion rate is 1. Every supported currency rounds
// half-up to two decimal places (i.e. to the cent).

  run(amount: number, order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number;

const STAGES: readonly Stage[] = [
  { name: "subtotal", run: (_amount, order) => subtotal(order) },
  { name: "discount", run: (amount, order) => applyDiscounts(order, amount) },
  { name: "tax", run: (amount, _order, options) => applyTax(amount, options.vatRate) },
  { name: "rounding", run: (amount, order) => applyRounding(amount, order.currency) },
];

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  let amount = 0;
  for (const stage of STAGES) {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
    amount = stage.run(amount, order, options);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, amount);
  }
  return amount;
}

// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

}

  for (const item of order.items) {

}

  let total = 0;
  for (const item of order.items) {

  return total;
}

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
const DISCOUNTS: { name: string; applies(order: Order): boolean; factor: number }[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    factor: 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    factor: 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    factor: 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing options
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS: Required<Omit<PricingOptions, "hooks">> = {
  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up",
  locale: "en-GB",
};

function resolveOptions(
  options?: PricingOptions,
): Required<Omit<PricingOptions, "hooks">> & { hooks: PricingHooks } {
  return {
    ...DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS,
    ...(options ?? {}),
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** All supported currencies round the same way: half-up to the nearest cent/penny. */
function roundToCents(value: number): number {
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing stages
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function subtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce(
    (sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
    0,
  );
}

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  return DISCOUNTS.reduce(
    (running, discount) =>
      discount.applies(order) ? running * discount.factor : running,
    amount,
  );
}

function runStages(
  order: Order,
  options: ReturnType<typeof resolveOptions>,
): number {
  const runStage = (stageName: string, compute: (running: number) => number, running: number) => {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stageName);
    const result = compute(running);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stageName, result);
    return result;
  };

  let running = 0;
  running = runStage("subtotal", () => subtotal(order), running);
  running = runStage("discount", (r) => applyDiscounts(order, r), running);
  running = runStage("tax", (r) => r * (1 + options.vatRate), running);
  running = runStage("rounding", (r) => roundToCents(r), running);
  return running;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Facade
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ReturnType<typeof resolveOptions>;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runStages(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal

  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;

  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

// stacks onto the running subtotal.
const DISCOUNTS: {
  name: string;
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) => order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) => new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

// Every supported currency rounds half-up to two decimal places, so rounding
// needs no per-currency lookup.
const STAGES: {
  name: string;
  run(total: number, order: Order, vatRate: number): number;
}[] = [
  {
    name: "subtotal",
    run: (_total, order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
  },
  {
    name: "discount",
    run: (total, order) =>
      DISCOUNTS.reduce((t, discount) => (discount.applies(order) ? discount.apply(t) : t), total),
  },
  {
    name: "tax",
    run: (total, _order, vatRate) => total * (1 + vatRate),
  },
  {
    name: "rounding",
    run: (total) => Math.round(total * 100) / 100,
  },
];

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    for (const stage of STAGES) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
      total = stage.run(total, order, this.vatRate);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, total);
    }
    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

/**

 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing options
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE = "half-up";
const DEFAULT_LOCALE = "en-GB";

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * Each discount applies only when its condition holds, in this fixed order:
 * bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. All three can stack.
 */
const DISCOUNTS: {
  name: string;
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    name: "multi-line",
    applies: (order) =>
      new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    name: "loyalty",
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * All supported currencies round the same way (nearest cent/penny, half-up);
 * the per-currency lookup exists so a currency with different minor-unit
 * rules could be added without changing callers.
 */
const ROUNDING_POLICIES: Record<Currency, (value: number) => number> = {
  GBP: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  EUR: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
  USD: (value) => Math.round(value * 100) / 100,
};

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline stages
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/**
 * Orders are priced in their own currency today, so this is always a no-op;
 * the stage exists so that cross-currency settlement can be introduced
 * without restructuring the pipeline.
 */
function settleCurrency(amount: number, _from: Currency, _to: Currency): number {
  return amount;
}

const STAGES: {
  stageName: string;
  run(order: Order, options: Required<PricingOptions>, runningTotal: number): number;
}[] = [
  {
    stageName: "subtotal",
    run: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce(
        (total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
        0,
      ),
  },
  {
    stageName: "discount",
    run: (order, _options, runningTotal) =>
      DISCOUNTS.reduce(
        (amount, discount) =>
          discount.applies(order) ? discount.apply(amount) : amount,
        runningTotal,
      ),
  },
  {
    stageName: "tax",
    run: (_order, options, runningTotal) =>
      runningTotal * (1 + options.vatRate),
  },
  {
    stageName: "rounding",
    run: (order, _options, runningTotal) => {
      const settled = settleCurrency(runningTotal, order.currency, order.currency);
      return ROUNDING_POLICIES[order.currency](settled);
    },
  },
];

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): Required<PricingOptions> {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? DEFAULT_ROUNDING_MODE,
    locale: options?.locale ?? DEFAULT_LOCALE,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: Required<PricingOptions>): number {
  let runningTotal = 0;
  for (const stage of STAGES) {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.stageName);
    runningTotal = stage.run(order, options, runningTotal);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.stageName, runningTotal);
  }
  return runningTotal;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: Required<PricingOptions>;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and

export interface OrderItem {

  quantity: number;

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];

  loyaltyMember: boolean;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const DISCOUNTS: { name: string; applies(order: Order): boolean; factor: number }[] = [
  {
    name: "bulk",
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    factor: 0.9,
  },
  {

  },

    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    factor: 0.95,
  },
];

// Pricing options
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up",
  locale: "en-GB",
};

function resolveOptions(
  options?: PricingOptions,
): Required<Omit<PricingOptions, "hooks">> & { hooks: PricingHooks } {
  return {
    ...DEFAULT_PRICING_OPTIONS,
    ...(options ?? {}),
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

): number {

  running = runStage("rounding", (r) => roundToCents(r), running);

  private readonly options: ReturnType<typeof resolveOptions>;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {

  }

  price(order: Order): number {

};

const PIPELINE: readonly Stage[] = [SUBTOTAL_STAGE, DISCOUNT_STAGE, TAX_STAGE, ROUNDING_STAGE];

/**

 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the

  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;

  vatRate?: number;

  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  let result = subtotal;

  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  if (totalQuantity >= 10) result *= 0.9;

  const distinctLineNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name));
  if (distinctLineNames.size >= 3) result *= 0.98;

  if (order.loyaltyMember) result *= 0.95;

  return result;
}

/** All supported currencies round half-up to two decimal places. */
function roundToCurrency(value: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    const run = (name: string, next: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
      total = next();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, total);
    };

    run("subtotal", () =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
    );
    run("discount", () => applyDiscounts(total, order));
    run("tax", () => total * (1 + this.vatRate));
    run("rounding", () => roundToCurrency(total, order.currency));

    return total;
  }
}

  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

// (i.e. to the nearest cent/penny). Kept as a lookup so a currency with a
// different minor-unit convention can be added without touching callers.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function roundToCents(value: number): number {
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

const ROUNDERS: Record<Currency, (value: number) => number> = {
  GBP: roundToCents,
  EUR: roundToCents,
  USD: roundToCents,
};

function round(value: number, currency: Currency): number {
  const rounder = ROUNDERS[currency];
  if (!rounder) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return rounder(value);
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing options
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_OPTIONS: Required<Omit<PricingOptions, "hooks">> = {
  vatRate: 0.2,
  roundingMode: "half-up",
  locale: "en-GB",
};

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions) {
  return {
    ...DEFAULT_OPTIONS,
    ...options,
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing pipeline
//
// Each stage takes the running total (and the order/options) and returns the
// new running total. Hooks fire before/after every stage so callers can
// observe the price build up.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

type ResolvedOptions = ReturnType<typeof resolveOptions>;

interface Stage {
  readonly name: string;
  run(runningTotal: number, order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number;
}

const SUBTOTAL_STAGE: Stage = {
  name: "subtotal",
  run(_runningTotal, order) {
    return order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0);
  },
};

const DISCOUNT_STAGE: Stage = {
  name: "discount",
  run(runningTotal, order) {
    let total = runningTotal;
    for (const discount of DISCOUNTS) {
      if (discount.applies(order)) {
        total = discount.apply(total);
      }
    }
    return total;
  },
};

const TAX_STAGE: Stage = {
  name: "tax",
  run(runningTotal, _order, options) {
    return runningTotal * (1 + options.vatRate);
  },
};

const ROUNDING_STAGE: Stage = {
  name: "rounding",
  run(runningTotal, order) {
    return round(runningTotal, order.currency);
  },
};

const PIPELINE: readonly Stage[] = [SUBTOTAL_STAGE, DISCOUNT_STAGE, TAX_STAGE, ROUNDING_STAGE];

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  let runningTotal = 0;
  for (const stage of PIPELINE) {
    options.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
    runningTotal = stage.run(runningTotal, order, options);
    options.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, runningTotal);
  }
  return runningTotal;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  return totalQuantity >= 10 ? subtotal * 0.9 : subtotal;
}

function multiLineDiscount(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  const distinctItems = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;
  return distinctItems >= 3 ? subtotal * 0.98 : subtotal;
}

function loyaltyDiscount(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  return order.loyaltyMember ? subtotal * 0.95 : subtotal;
}

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  amount = bulkDiscount(order, amount);
  amount = multiLineDiscount(order, amount);
  amount = loyaltyDiscount(order, amount);
  return amount;
}

/**

 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  let result = subtotal;

  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  if (totalQuantity >= 10) result *= 0.9;

  const distinctLineNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name));
  if (distinctLineNames.size >= 3) result *= 0.98;

  if (order.loyaltyMember) result *= 0.95;

  return result;
}

/** All supported currencies round half-up to two decimal places. */

  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    const run = (name: string, next: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
      total = next();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, total);
    };

    run("subtotal", () =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
    );
    run("discount", () => applyDiscounts(total, order));
    run("tax", () => total * (1 + this.vatRate));
    run("rounding", () => roundToCurrency(total, order.currency));

    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
//
// Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function bulkDiscount(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  return totalQuantity >= 10 ? subtotal * 0.9 : subtotal;
}

function multiLineDiscount(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  const distinctItems = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size;
  return distinctItems >= 3 ? subtotal * 0.98 : subtotal;
}

function loyaltyDiscount(order: Order, subtotal: number): number {
  return order.loyaltyMember ? subtotal * 0.95 : subtotal;
}

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  amount = bulkDiscount(order, amount);
  amount = multiLineDiscount(order, amount);
  amount = loyaltyDiscount(order, amount);
  return amount;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing pipeline
//
// Currency conversion is a no-op today: orders are priced in their own
// currency, and every conversion rate is 1. Every supported currency rounds
// half-up to two decimal places (i.e. to the cent).
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

function subtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce(
    (total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
    0,
  );
}

function applyTax(amount: number, vatRate: number): number {
  return amount * (1 + vatRate);
}

function applyRounding(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

function runPipeline(order: Order, vatRate: number, hooks: PricingHooks): number {
  const stages: Array<[string, (amount: number) => number]> = [
    ["subtotal", () => subtotal(order)],
    ["discount", (amount) => applyDiscounts(order, amount)],
    ["tax", (amount) => applyTax(amount, vatRate)],
    ["rounding", (amount) => applyRounding(amount, order.currency)],
  ];

  let amount = 0;
  for (const [name, run] of stages) {
    hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
    amount = run(amount);
    hooks.afterStage?.(name, amount);
  }
  return amount;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.vatRate, this.hooks);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  let result = subtotal;

  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  if (totalQuantity >= 10) {
    result *= 0.9;
  }

  const distinctLineNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name));
  if (distinctLineNames.size >= 3) {
    result *= 0.98;
  }

  if (order.loyaltyMember) {
    result *= 0.95;
  }

  return result;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Rounding
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

/** All supported currencies round half-up to two decimal places. */
function roundToCurrency(value: number): number {
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pipeline stages
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface Stage {
  name: string;
  run(total: number, order: Order, vatRate: number): number;
}

const STAGES: Stage[] = [
  {
    name: "subtotal",
    run: (_total, order) =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
  },
  {
    name: "discount",
    run: (total, order) => applyDiscounts(total, order),
  },
  {
    name: "tax",
    run: (total, _order, vatRate) => total * (1 + vatRate),
  },
  {
    name: "rounding",
    run: (total) => roundToCurrency(total),
  },
];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Facade
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    for (const stage of STAGES) {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(stage.name);
      total = stage.run(total, order, this.vatRate);
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(stage.name, total);
    }
    return total;
  }
}

  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;
const SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES: readonly Currency[] = ["GBP", "EUR", "USD"];

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Discounts
//
// Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

const DISCOUNT_RULES: ReadonlyArray<{
  applies(order: Order): boolean;
  apply(subtotal: number): number;
}> = [
  {
    // Bulk: 10+ total units.
    applies: (order) =>
      order.items.reduce((total, item) => total + item.quantity, 0) >= 10,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.9,
  },
  {
    // Multi-line: 3+ distinct items.
    applies: (order) =>
      new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name)).size >= 3,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

function roundToCents(value: number): number {
  return Math.round(value * 100) / 100;
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Pricing pipeline
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

interface ResolvedOptions {
  vatRate: number;
  roundingMode: "half-up";
  locale: string;
  hooks: PricingHooks;
}

function resolveOptions(options?: PricingOptions): ResolvedOptions {
  return {
    vatRate: options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE,
    roundingMode: options?.roundingMode ?? "half-up",
    locale: options?.locale ?? "en-GB",
    hooks: options?.hooks ?? {},
  };
}

function computeSubtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce(
    (total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
    0,
  );
}

function applyDiscounts(order: Order, amount: number): number {
  return DISCOUNT_RULES.reduce(
    (running, rule) => (rule.applies(order) ? rule.apply(running) : running),
    amount,
  );
}

function applyRounding(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (!SUPPORTED_CURRENCIES.includes(currency)) {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return roundToCents(amount);
}

function runPipeline(order: Order, options: ResolvedOptions): number {
  const { hooks } = options;

  const runStage = (name: string, compute: () => number): number => {
    hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
    const result = compute();
    hooks.afterStage?.(name, result);
    return result;
  };

  const subtotal = runStage("subtotal", () => computeSubtotal(order));
  const discounted = runStage("discount", () =>
    applyDiscounts(order, subtotal),
  );
  const taxed = runStage("tax", () => discounted * (1 + options.vatRate));
  return runStage("rounding", () => applyRounding(taxed, order.currency));
}

// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// Public API
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly options: ResolvedOptions;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.options = resolveOptions(options);
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    return runPipeline(order, this.options);
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

  hooks?: PricingHooks;

  );

  return DISCOUNT_RULES.reduce(
    (running, rule) => (rule.applies(order) ? rule.apply(running) : running),

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLineNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name));

  let result = subtotal;
  if (totalQuantity >= 10) result *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLineNames.size >= 3) result *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) result *= 0.95;
  return result;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    const run = (name: string, next: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
      total = next();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, total);
    };

    run("subtotal", () =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
    );
    run("discount", () => applyDiscounts(total, order));
    run("tax", () => total * (1 + this.vatRate));
    // All supported currencies round half-up to two decimal places.
    run("rounding", () => Math.round(total * 100) / 100);

    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}

/**
 * Order pricing module.
 *
 * Computes the total price of an order: item subtotal, discounts, VAT, and
 * currency-aware rounding. The public surface is `computePrice`, the
 * `PricingFacade`, and the option/type exports; everything else is internal
 * machinery.
 */

export interface OrderItem {
  name: string;
  unitPrice: number;
  quantity: number;
}

export type Currency = "GBP" | "EUR" | "USD";

export interface Order {
  items: OrderItem[];
  currency: Currency;
  loyaltyMember: boolean;
}

export interface PricingHooks {
  beforeStage?(stageName: string): void;
  afterStage?(stageName: string, runningTotal: number): void;
}

export interface PricingOptions {
  vatRate?: number;
  /** Only half-up rounding is implemented; the enum anticipates bankers'. */
  roundingMode?: "half-up";
  /** Reserved for localised price formatting. */
  locale?: string;
  /** Observability hooks invoked around every pipeline stage. */
  hooks?: PricingHooks;
}

const DEFAULT_VAT_RATE = 0.2;

/** Applied in order: bulk, then multi-line, then loyalty. */
function applyDiscounts(subtotal: number, order: Order): number {
  const totalQuantity = order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.quantity, 0);
  const distinctLineNames = new Set(order.items.map((item) => item.name));

  let result = subtotal;
  if (totalQuantity >= 10) result *= 0.9;
  if (distinctLineNames.size >= 3) result *= 0.98;
  if (order.loyaltyMember) result *= 0.95;
  return result;
}

export class PricingFacade {
  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {
    this.vatRate = options?.vatRate ?? DEFAULT_VAT_RATE;
    this.hooks = options?.hooks ?? {};
  }

  price(order: Order): number {
    let total = 0;
    const run = (name: string, next: () => number) => {
      this.hooks.beforeStage?.(name);
      total = next();
      this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, total);
    };

    run("subtotal", () =>
      order.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.unitPrice * item.quantity, 0),
    );
    run("discount", () => applyDiscounts(total, order));
    run("tax", () => total * (1 + this.vatRate));
    // All supported currencies round half-up to two decimal places.
    run("rounding", () => Math.round(total * 100) / 100);

    return total;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
```

  hooks?: PricingHooks;

    applies: (order) =>

    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.98,
  },
  {
    applies: (order) => order.loyaltyMember,
    apply: (subtotal) => subtotal * 0.95,
  },
];

/** GBP, EUR, and USD all round the same way: half-up to the nearest cent. */
function roundForCurrency(amount: number, currency: Currency): number {
  if (currency !== "GBP" && currency !== "EUR" && currency !== "USD") {
    throw new Error(`no rounding policy for currency: ${currency}`);
  }
  return Math.round(amount * 100) / 100;
}

function computeSubtotal(order: Order): number {
  return order.items.reduce(
    (total, item) => total + item.unitPrice * item.quantity,
    0,
  );
}

  return DISCOUNTS.reduce(
    (amount, discount) =>

  );
}

  private readonly vatRate: number;
  private readonly hooks: PricingHooks;

  constructor(options?: PricingOptions) {

    const result = compute();
    this.hooks.afterStage?.(name, result);
    return result;
  }
}

export function computePrice(order: Order, options?: PricingOptions): number {
  return new PricingFacade(options).price(order);
}
